title: E1.5 re-judgment: model x effort ladder over the frozen E1 projections
constraint: No human labels are used anywhere in this experiment (Paul, 2026-07-17). Judge consensus produces SILVER labels only, never truth.

fixed_materials.units: bench/e1_shards/shard_01..20.jsonl (384 def projections, commit 6772935) - byte-identical to E1 v0
fixed_materials.prompts: reports/e1/annot_v1/prompts/shard_01..20.txt - sha256 per file in prompts_manifest.json (frozen at this commit)
fixed_materials.prompt_delta_vs_v0: instruction block only: adds mandatory rationale{evidence,rule,counterfactual,uncertainty}; projections unchanged; role vocabulary unchanged (5 classes)

judges.deviation: Paul specified aclaude-b/c accounts; octoloop has no opus lane, so runs on the session account
Paul specified aclaude-d/e; same reason as opus48_max
runs on main codex account; acodex-b is not wired as an octoloop lane
Paul said max; packet effort enum tops at xhigh
Paul said high; the live lane pin is grok-4.5-xhigh (grok surface ceiling)
no rationale fields (v0 schema); baseline rung only

canary_policy: shard_01 canary runs (one per live judge) validate the harness only; canary outputs live under raw_canary/ and are EXCLUDED from analysis; binding data = post-freeze runs of all 20 shards including a fresh shard_01

validity_gate.B3_judge_valid: a judge run is VALID iff >=95% of its 384 answers parse AND are rationale-complete (all 4 rationale fields non-empty, evidence >=20 chars); one re-run allowed per failed shard, else the judge is reported PARTIAL and flagged in every downstream table

primary_metrics: pairwise role agreement over commonly-answered defs, all 15 judge pairs (5 live + ornith v0)
Fleiss kappa across the 5 live judges on role
wall_likelihood pairwise Pearson + bucket agreement with v0 cutoffs (low<=0.3 < mid < 0.7<=high)

preregistered_bands.B1_task_well_posed: mean pairwise ROLE agreement among {opus48_max, fable5_high, sol56_xhigh} >= 0.70 -> well-posed; 0.60-0.70 -> marginal; <0.60 -> task/projection ambiguity dominates and projection redesign precedes any further annotation spend
preregistered_bands.B2_ladder_visible: top-tier mean pairwise role agreement minus 0.5491 (E1 v0 ornith x sonnet, calibration_v0.json) >= +0.10 -> capability ladder visible; else judge tier does not explain E1 disagreement
preregistered_bands.B4_likelihood_usable: top-tier mean pairwise Pearson on wall_likelihood >= 0.70 -> LLM consensus qualifies as SILVER for detector crosscheck v1; <0.50 -> likelihood scale unreliable, role-only downstream

exploratory_no_bands: rationale typology (what evidence classes judges cite)
divergence top-20 recomputation per judge pair
